commonQuestions.question: What is OKX?
commonQuestions.answer: Major global exchange founded in 2017 as OKEx, rebranded OKX in January 2022. Serves 50M+ users. Strong in derivatives, copy trading, DEX aggregator, and NFT marketplace. Holds Dubai VARA and Bahamas SCB licences. Own Web3 wallet.

commonQuestions.question: Is OKX safe?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX is a top-tier centralized exchange. CoinGecko trust score: 10/10 (rank #4).  Like all CEXs, funds are custodied by the exchange — use hardware wallets for long-term storage. Enable 2FA, use a strong unique password, and whitelist withdrawal addresses where available. Never share API keys.

commonQuestions.question: What is the OKX promo/referral code?
commonQuestions.answer: The CryptoBonusWorld referral code for OKX is CRYPTOBONUSW. It is pre-filled automatically when you register via our link. Using it activates the welcome bonus of up to 5000 USDT.

commonQuestions.question: How much is the OKX welcome bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Via CryptoBonusWorld, the current OKX welcome bonus is up to 5000 USDT. This is a task-based reward: completing KYC, making a qualifying deposit, and reaching trading volume milestones unlocks different reward tiers. The full amount requires all milestones — most users completing a standard deposit earn a meaningful first-week reward. Bonus amounts are typically trading fee vouchers, not withdrawable cash.

commonQuestions.question: How do I claim the OKX bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Step 1: Click the registration link on the CryptoBonusWorld OKX page — the referral code/link is pre-filled. Step 2: Complete email/phone verification. Step 3: Complete KYC identity verification (required for bonuses). Step 4: Make a qualifying deposit (crypto transfer or card). Step 5: Check your Rewards Center / Bonus Hub for active tasks and complete trading volume milestones within the campaign window (usually 30 days). Vouchers are credited to your account as you complete each task tier.

commonQuestions.question: What are OKX spot trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX spot trading fees: 0.08% maker / 0.1% taker (standard). OKX offers tiered fee reductions with OKB token holdings. VIP tiers can reduce spot fees to near zero.

commonQuestions.question: What are OKX futures trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX USDT-margined perpetual futures: 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker. Maximum leverage: 100×. Futures trading carries substantial risk of capital loss from liquidation. Up to 100× leverage available.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX have P2P trading?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX P2P (formerly C2C) offers 0% platform fee with multiple local payment methods.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX have copy trading?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX copy trading lets users mirror lead traders across spot and futures positions.

commonQuestions.question: Is OKX available in the United States?
commonQuestions.answer: No. OKX restricts US residents from registering. US users should use Coinbase or Kraken as regulated alternatives.

commonQuestions.question: Is OKX available in the United Kingdom?
commonQuestions.answer: UK availability for OKX should be verified on the official website, as FCA compliance and local regulatory status may affect service availability.

commonQuestions.question: What cryptocurrencies does OKX support?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX lists 301 cryptocurrencies across 1211 trading pairs. OKX regularly lists emerging altcoins alongside major assets.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX have a mobile app?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. OKX has official iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play) apps. Download from the official OKX website (https://www.okx.com/app or equivalent) or directly from the official app store listing to avoid counterfeit apps.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX require KYC?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. OKX requires KYC (identity verification) to unlock full trading, withdrawals, and welcome bonus eligibility. Process: government-issued ID + selfie/liveness check. Typically completes in 2–30 minutes for automated approval; up to 24 hours for manual review.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX have Proof of Reserves?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. OKX publishes monthly Proof of Reserves with Merkle tree verification.

commonQuestions.question: What leverage does OKX offer?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX offers up to 100× leverage on futures. Standard: 10–20× for most trading pairs. High leverage available — suitable only for experienced traders with strict risk management. Leverage availability varies by asset and KYC level.

commonQuestions.question: When was OKX founded and who founded it?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX was founded in 2017. Founder: Star Xu; CEO: Star Xu.

commonQuestions.question: How many users does OKX have?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX serves 50M+ registered users across 160+ countries as of 2026.

commonQuestions.question: What is OKX's 24-hour trading volume?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX's 24-hour spot trading volume is approximately $1.72B (27 302,09 BTC) as of the last data pull (2026-06-08). This places OKX at CoinGecko rank #4 by trust-adjusted volume.

commonQuestions.question: Does OKX have a native token?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. OKX's native token is OKB. Use: Trading fee discount, staking, Earn, OKX Chain gas.

commonQuestions.question: What is OKX's CoinGecko trust score?
commonQuestions.answer: OKX has a CoinGecko trust score of 10/10, placing it at rank #4 globally. CoinGecko's trust score assesses exchange API accuracy, trading volume legitimacy, and cybersecurity posture.
